summary: Completed testing of admin settings, PB cache endpoints, and admin dashboard UI. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified Settings panel, Analytics, and Activity Logs pages load correctly.

issues: CORS error for ipapi.co geolocation service (non-blocking, falls back to browser locale)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/admin/settings requires admin auth, returns full settings
✅ GET /api/booking/cache-status returns total_cached_clients > 0 (10043 clients) and last_sync
✅ GET /api/booking/cache-lookup returns found=true for raymond@fireside360.co.uk with record_id
✅ GET /api/booking/cache-lookup returns found=false for nonexistent emails
✅ GET /api/booking/pb-clients/lookup requires admin auth (401 without, 403 for non-admin)
✅ GET /api/booking/pb-clients/lookup returns found=true with pb_record_id for known emails
✅ POST /api/auth/login works for admin and regular users
✅ Admin dashboard Settings button visible and clickable
✅ Settings panel shows availability_days input with Save button
✅ Changing availability_days and saving persists the value
✅ Activity Logs page loads and shows events
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin settings and PB cache endpoints verified working. Cache has 10043 clients synced from Practice Better. Settings stored in MongoDB 'settings' collection with _id='app_settings'. The /api/booking/pb-clients/fetch endpoint is long-running (30-60s) and was not tested via pytest but was verified by main agent via curl. Note: raymond@fireside360.co.uk has admin role per test_credentials.md.

features_tested.GET /api/admin/settings: PASS - Returns full settings with admin auth
features_tested.Admin Settings UI: PASS - Settings button, panel, input, save all work
